name: IDEXX Laboratories, Inc.
description: IDEXX Laboratories, Inc. is a global leader in veterinary diagnostics, software, and water microbiology testing. The company develops, manufactures, and distributes products and services primarily for the companion animal veterinary, livestock and poultry, water testing, and dairy markets. IDEXX's solutions include in-clinic diagnostic analyzers, reference laboratory services, practice management software, and rapid assay tests that help veterinarians provide advanced medical care, improve staff efficiency, and build more economically successful practices.
